response.justification: Wei is a highly experienced individual contributor with a strong background in distributed systems and recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure. However, the candidate fundamentally lacks the executive-level leadership experience, the track record of scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+ people, and the deep domain expertise in algorithmic fintech infrastructure required for this CTO role.
strengths: Extensive engineering experience across distributed systems, microservices, and high-throughput environments.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial drive as the founder and lead developer of an open-source Geo-Data platform.
concerns: Lacks executive leadership experience and has no demonstrated track record of scaling engineering teams or managing technical leaders.
No evidence of architecting complex, real-time algorithmic credit or working-capital systems in a fintech context.
Multi-agent AI experience appears very recent and at an individual contributor level, rather than defining enterprise AI strategy.
